prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约 8574→8016→7695→6118→6790 名，整体呈波动后移趋势；2024 年大幅前移至 6118 名后，2025 年回弹至 6790 名，近 2 年累计后移约 672 名，2025 年基准约 6790 名；该校在云南省理科（物理类）招生计划 2021 年 149 人、2022 年 151 人、2023 年 150 人、2024 年 152 人、2025 年 158 人；2026 年计划 159 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招 1 人（+0.63%），扩招幅度极小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南交通大学为 211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 51 名持续上升至 2026 年第 49 名，首次进入前 50，学校综合实力与声誉稳步提升，对高分考生吸引力有所增强；近年声誉评价中性/混合，2023 年有考生因分数线波动被录取后反馈满意；抖音热度排名第 94 位（评价「一般」），短视频曝光量中等偏低，未见明显报考关注升温信号；历史投档异常记录中仅 2023 年有一条低关注度记录，无显著断档或负面舆情；交通运输工程 A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程 A，均为该校王牌学科；与招生专业中的交通运输类、土木工程等直接对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，西南交大以工科见长，受益于工科整体报考热度；云南省 2026 年高考总人数约 37.79 万（较 2025 年约 28.57 万增加约 32%），按近年物理类占比约 60.7% 估算，物理类考生约 22.92 万，较 2025 年 17.33 万大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；西南交通大学位于四川成都，属西南地区，与云南地理邻近，地域偏好上有一定优势；该校在云南招生人数占全国总招生比例约 2%–3%，属中等偏低省份份额。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026 年计划仅微扩 1 人、云南省物理类考生大幅增加约 32%、学校软科排名首次进入前 50 提升吸引力、工科专业热度持续偏高等因素，在 2025 年基准 6790 名基础上预计竞争加剧、位次后移；预测最低位次约 6866 名，区间 6366–7366 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 电子信息类（微电子科学与工程、电子科学与技术）
- 交通运输类（交通运输、交通工程）
- 人工智能。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 机械类（机械设计制造及其自动化、测控技术与仪器、工业工程）
- 数据科学与大数据技术

- 自动化

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 6366–7366 名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向，一档王牌专业（计算机类、电气、交通运输类）可作为冲刺目标，三档专业作为稳妥保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<6366 名）可重点冲击一档 A+ 学科专业；位次接近区间上限（>7366 名）建议以三档专业为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 8574→8016→7695→6118→6790, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; after a significant forward shift to 6118 in 2024, it rebounded to 6790 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 672 positions over the past 2 years, and the 2025 baseline is approximately 6790; the university's enrollment plan in Yunnan for science (physics category) was 149 in 2021, 151 in 2022, 150 in 2023, 152 in 2024, and 158 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 159, a slight increase of 1 person (+0.63%) compared to 2025, with a very small expansion that has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwest Jiaotong University is a 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 51st in 2021 to 49th in 2026, entering the top 50 for the first time, indicating a steady improvement in comprehensive strength and reputation, which enhances its appeal to high-scoring candidates; recent reputation evaluations are neutral/mixed, with some candidates in 2023 being admitted due to score fluctuations and expressing satisfaction afterwards; Douyin popularity ranking is 94th (rated as 'average'), with moderately low short video exposure and no clear signs of increased application attention; there is only one low-attention record of historical admission anomalies in 2023, with no significant gaps or negative public opinion; Transportation Engineering is A+ (top in the country) and Civil Engineering is A, both are flagship disciplines of the university; they directly correspond to majors such as Transportation and Civil Engineering in the enrollment list, strongly attracting candidates interested in these fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended; Southwest Jiaotong University excels in engineering, benefiting from the overall popularity of engineering majors; the total number of candidates in Yunnan for the 2026 college entrance examination is approximately 377,900 (an increase of about 32% from approximately 285,700 in 2025), and based on the recent physics category proportion of about 60.7%, the estimated number of physics category candidates is about 229,200, a significant increase from 173,300 in 2025, leading to intensified competition; Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the southwestern region, geographically close to Yunnan, giving it some advantage in regional preference; the university's enrollment in Yunnan accounts for about 2%–3% of its total national enrollment, a moderately low provincial share.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the 2026 plan with only a slight increase of 1 person, the significant increase of about 32% in physics category candidates in Yunnan, the university's Soft Science ranking entering the top 50 for the first time enhancing its appeal, and the sustained high popularity of engineering majors, competition is expected to intensify and rankings are predicted to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 6790; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6866, with a range of 6366–7366.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Electronic Information (Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology)
- Transportation (Transportation, Traffic Engineering)
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Industrial Engineering)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology
- Communication Engineering
- Automation
- Vehicle Engineering
- Rail Transit Signal and Control.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Civil Engineering
- Materials Science and Engineering (Materials Science and Engineering, Materials Forming and Control Engineering)
- Surveying and Mapping (Surveying Engineering, Remote Sensing Science and Technology, Geographic Information Science)
- Business Administration (Information Management and Information Systems, Business Administration, Accounting, Engineering Management)
- Safety Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 6366–7366, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Transportation) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<6366), prioritize Tier 1 A+ discipline majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>7366), it is advisable to mainly apply for Tier 3 majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年文科（历史类）最低位次分别为约 1419→1477→1625→1782→2302 名，呈持续后移趋势，近 4 年累计后移约 883 名，2025 年基准约 2302 名；该校在云南省文科（历史类）招生计划 2021–2024 年均为 5 人，2025 年增至 9 人；2026 年计划 11 人，较 2025 年扩招 2 人（+22.2%），扩招幅度较大，理论上有利于降低竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 51 名持续上升至 2026 年第 49 名，首次进入前 50，学校综合实力稳步提升；近年声誉评价中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 94 位（评价「一般」），关注度不高；历史投档异常记录中仅 2023 年有一条低关注度记录，无显著断档信号；交通运输工程 A+、土木工程 A 为该校王牌学科，但文科（历史类）招生专业主要为法学、汉语言文学、外国语言文学类、思想政治教育等，与优势工科关联较弱。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 文科相关专业热度分化：法学分化观望、汉语言文学推荐、师范/教育分化观望、外国语言文学一般观望；云南省 2026 年高考总人数约 37.79 万，按近年历史类占比约 39.3% 估算，历史类考生约 14.87 万，较 2025 年 11.24 万增加约 32%，考生大幅增加显著加剧竞争；学校位于四川成都，与云南地理邻近，有一定地域偏好优势；该校在云南文科招生人数较少，2026 年计划 11 人，属小规模招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年计划扩招 22.2%（缓解竞争）、但历史类考生大幅增加约 32%（加剧竞争）、学校层次提升（吸引更多高分考生）等因素，扩招与考生增加相互抵消后竞争仍略加剧；在 2025 年基准 2302 名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约 2629 名，区间 2156–3102 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1419→1477→1625→1782→2302, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 883 positions over the past 4 years, and a baseline of approximately 2302 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Yunnan Province was 5 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 9 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 11 students, an increase of 2 students (+22.2%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, theoretically conducive to reducing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 51st in 2021 to 49th in 2026, entering the top 50 for the first time, with steadily improving comprehensive strength; recent reputation evaluations are neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 94th (rated 'average'), with low attention; in historical abnormal admission records, only one low-attention record in 2023, with no significant gap signals; Transportation Engineering A+ and Civil Engineering A are the university's flagship disciplines, but liberal arts (history category) majors mainly include Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literature, and Ideological and Political Education, which are weakly related to the advantageous engineering fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts-related major popularity is polarized: Law is divided and wait-and-see, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, Teacher Training/Education is divided and wait-and-see, Foreign Languages and Literature is generally wait-and-see; the total number of Yunnan Province college entrance examination takers in 2026 is about 377,900, with history category accounting for approximately 39.3% in recent years, estimating about 148,700 history category examinees, an increase of about 32% from 112,400 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, geographically close to Yunnan, with certain regional preference advantages; the university's liberal arts enrollment in Yunnan is small, with 11 students planned for 2026, a small-scale enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 plan expansion of 22.2% (alleviating competition), but the significant increase of about 32% in history category examinees (intensifying competition), and the improvement in university level (attracting more high-scoring students), the expansion and increase in examinees offset each other, but competition still slightly intensifies; based on the 2025 baseline of 2302, the ranking is expected to continue to move backward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2629, with a range of 2156–3102.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Law
- Chinese Language and Literature.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Ideological and Political Education
- Political Science and Public Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2156–3102, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, with Tier 1 Law and Chinese Language and Literature as sprint targets, and Tier 3 Foreign Languages and Literature as a safe backup; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2156), you can focus on sprinting for Law; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>3102), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 majors.
